releases.name: Kale Graph 1.1.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- Internal code restructure 🔧
  - Move source code to the `src` directory
  - Split source code into more files
  - Update [`GraphData`](https://github.com/olillin/kale-graph/blob/1.0.3/src/types.ts) format
  - New [`KaleGraphRenderer`](https://github.com/olillin/kale-graph/blob/1.0.3/src/graph-renderer.ts)
- Update compliance with the [Obsidian Plugin guidelines](https://docs.obsidian.md/Plugins/Releasing/Plugin+guidelines) ⚖
  - [Avoid `innerHTML`, `outerHTML` and `insertAdjacentHTML`](https://docs.obsidian.md/Plugins/Releasing/Plugin+guidelines#Avoid%20%60innerHTML%60,%20%60outerHTML%60%20and%20%60insertAdjacentHTML%60)
  - [Prefer `const` and `let` over `var`](https://docs.obsidian.md/Plugins/Releasing/Plugin+guidelines#Prefer+%60const%60+and+%60let%60+over+%60var%60)
releases.name: Kale Graph 1.0.3

releases.description: Update settings menu to comply with the [Plugin Guidelines](https://docs.obsidian.md/Plugins/Releasing/Plugin+guidelines#UI%20text).

releases.author: olillin
releases.description:
First release! 🎉

## Features

- Graph rendering
- Path/cycle parsing
- Flags
  - Directed
  - Simple
  - Auto
- Customize graph appearance in plugin settings
releases.name: Kale Graph 1.0.0
